description: The foundational federal privacy and security framework
Protects PHI and defines rights (incl. 2024 Reproductive Health updates)
Defines administrative physical and technical safeguards for ePHI
Defines breach assessment and reporting requirements
Establishes investigations penalties and compliance procedures

cfr_reference: A specific standard within a HIPAA Rule (e.g. Access Control)
